name: Brady Bunch Party Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Mild italian sausage; cook - drain
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Spread sauce over crust.
3. Top with all remaining ingredients except Parmesan and olive oil.
4. Sprinkle cheese on top.
5. Drizzle pizza with oil.
6. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until crust is brown.
